summary: Superb matrix recording captures a playful, high‑energy show with standout China Cat Sunflower → I Know You Rider and The Other One jams.
review: The Oade‑Schoeps mix delivers crystal‑clear audio that blends audience ambience with soundboard detail, giving the performance an immersive feel. Fans rave about the hot bandwork—Jerry’s slide on C.C. Rider, Bob’s vocal antics, Phil’s bass drive and a killer The Other One jam—making this 1986 Greek Theater show one of the year’s highlights despite a few mixed‑bag opinions on overall setlist strength.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers (5/6) give 4–5 stars and praise both the recording clarity and the musical performance, with only one moderate 3‑star comment focused on overall impression.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crystal‑clear blend of audience ambience and soundboard detail; described as superb, top‑notch, clear and clean throughout.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
show_quality.setlist_flow: Playful banter between sets, a seamless transition into a jam‑heavy The Other One (instead of Space), and strong crowd participation keep the energy high and the pacing tight.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for sparkling tone, slide work on C.C. Rider, energetic playing despite reported ‘decline’, and giving props to Bob.
band_member_comments.Phil: Noted for missing his usual intro on The Other One (replaced by a vocal intro) and being part of the light‑hearted pre‑Loser harassment.
band_member_comments.Bob: Highlighted for humorous banter with Jerry/Phil, holding hands during Not Fade Away, and delivering strong vocals.
band_member_comments.Drums: Drummers kept the groove nonstop, especially during the extended The Other One jam.
